articles.author: Kirsten Grieshaber, Emma Burrows, Aamer Madhani
articles.title: Trump says US will reduce number of troops in Germany 'a lot further' than withdrawal of 5,000 - AP News
articles.description: President Donald Trump said the U.S. is going to significantly reduce its troop presence in Germany, escalating a dispute with Germany’s leader Friedrich Merz as he seeks to scale back America’s commitment to European security. The Pentagon had initially anno…
articles.content: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) President Donald Trump said on Saturday that the U.S. will significantly reduce its troop presence in Germany, escalating a dispute with Chancellor Friedrich Merz as he see… [+8059 chars]
